features: BULK PACK OF 20 BOXES: These high quality recyclable gold kraft paper card gift boxes with lids have a charming rustic look. When assembled each square box measures L12 x W12 x H5cm (4.72 x 4.72 x 1.96 inches). When they arrive they will be flatpacked and will each measure L38.5 x W33 (15.15 x 12.99 inches).

RECYCLABLE BOXES: Each gift box in this set is 100% recyclable. They arrive flatpacked for convenient storage until you need one. They are easy to assemble. To make up a box, simply fold along all the pre-scored lines and create the base first. Once you have done this, you can tuck the sides down to hold them in place. It is advised not to use these boxes for posting.

PERSONALISE PRESENTS: You can decorate these boxes to be as beautiful as the present inside. Add ribbons, bows, twine, wrapping paper, stickers, stamps and even your own artwork to fit the party or gifting theme. These boxes are great for home baked treats like cookies and sweets to give to friends and family. Also, you can create some thank you gift boxes to give to your work colleagues.

GIVE THE PERFECT GIFT: Since these boxes are blank they and can be decorated how you like, this makes them perfect for any celebration, event or occasion. Use them for gifting at bridesmaid parties, groomsman celebrations, mother's day & father's day, baby showers, weddings, birthday parties, Valentine's day, work parties, Halloween and of course Christmas.

DESIGNED FOR LIFE: Every product in our collection is built with purpose, blending function and style. Our thoughtfully crafted designs ensure lasting reliability and convenience when needed, ideal for any occasion. Please ensure all edible items are properly wrapped.
description: Kurtzy Gold Kraft Gift Boxes (20 Pack). Give the perfect gift this holiday season. You can decorate these boxes to be as beautiful as the present inside. What's Included: -20 x Flat packed Kraft postercard gift boxes. Dimensions: -Box assembled: L12 x W12 x H5cm (4.72 x 4.72 x 1.96 inches). -Box flatpacked: L38.5 x W33 (15.15 x 12.99 inches).
